message:
feat(ensemble): cross-project checkpoint resolution for resume, rerun, compare, and export

When a user references a run ID from a different project directory,
operations like resume, rerun, compare, and export-findings now search
across all configured projects to find it.

New resolveEnsembleCheckpointStoreForRunID scans the configured
ProjectsBase directory for subdirectories containing a matching
checkpoint run, resolving the correct store automatically. Falls back
to current project if zero matches; returns ambiguity error if multiple
match. Replaces direct newEnsembleCheckpointStore() calls in resume,
rerun, compare, and export-findings paths.

Four new tests verify cross-project resolution, zero-match fallback,
multi-match ambiguity error, and CWD-differs-from-checkpoint scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
